title: Leaky Gut After 40: What It Is and Why It Affects Your Immunity
tags: leaky gut, intestinal permeability, immunity, gut health, women over 40, inflammation, quercetin, tight junctions
excerpt: Your gut houses 70 percent of your immune system. After 40, estrogen decline, stress, and microbiome shifts can compromise the gut barrier, triggering systemic inflammation and immune dysfunction. Here is what the research shows.
seo_title: Leaky Gut After 40: What It Is and How It Affects Immunity
meta_description: Leaky gut after 40 drives systemic inflammation and immune problems. Learn what causes intestinal permeability, how it affects immunity, and what quercetin, zinc, and glutamine can do.
author: Happy Aging Team
